PARAGON MANAGEMENT GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KENNEDY-WILSON INTERNATIONAL MATTES, KATHERINE A. $2,067.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,099.00, DEFENDANT JONES LANG WOOTON IS CHANGED TO WILSON- KENNEDY INTERNATIONAL AT REQUEST OF ALL PARTIES.
